ksa_text: Knowledge of AI ethics principles and fairness evaluation methods, including bias detection and measurement techniques, fairness metrics, representativeness assessment, and the relationship between training data characteristics and model equity outcomes.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-026 (AI and Machine Learning) scores 0.395 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Embedding Engineer: in_scope. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. In-scope domain, score 0.395. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI and Machine Learning KSA AI-K-026 as a discrete competency for Embedding Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Embedding Engineer job posting data. AI content is governance/compliance/executive-communication focused, not engineering-platform scope. Not market-supported as discrete platform engineering competency.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI content is governance/compliance/executive-communication focused, not engineering-platform scope. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: No market evidence for this role.
